//: StoreBroker config for WinPrint (Microsoft Store). StoreBroker reads packaging
//1: inputs from `packageParameters` and the submission template from `appSubmission`.
//2: The Store ID is NOT in this file — pass it to the cmdlets, e.g.:

packageParameters.//pdp: Listing text lives in PDP/<lang>/PDP.xml; screenshots under ../screenshots/<lang>/.
packageParameters.//appx: For a packaged (MSIX) submission point AppxPath at the .msixupload. For an
packageParameters.//appx2: unpackaged MSI/EXE submission, manage the installer in Partner Center and use
packageParameters.//appx3: this config for listing metadata + screenshots only (omit AppxPath).

appSubmission.//: Submission defaults; review before publishing. Pricing/age-rating are in Partner Center.
